override_note: Baby-orphan-pickup escalation classified deep-attack with rationale "Content requires substantive argument revision or physics verification beyond verification-class scope" — but the actual scope is a current-text audit confirming EXP-275 (integrated 2026-04-29T01:18:46Z) closed the hole.
